creator: weaseal@gmail.com
text:
Upon investigation and discovering of www/phpSysInfo, and noticing that 
it currently uses a development version, I recommend closing this 
send-pr, moving www/phpSysInfo to www/phpSysInfo-dev, and re-opening 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=126793 to stand as 
www/phpsysinfo (as of version 2.5.4, the most recent stable version, the 
text-formatting on http://phpsysinfo.sf.net is "phpsysinfo", and in the 
development version 3.0-RC6 it is "phpSysInfo."
